message:
feat(setup): add SSH config parsing infrastructure

Introduce SSH config (~/.ssh/config) parsing capabilities for extracting
structured host configuration data.

New types:
- SshHost: Structured host entry with alias, hostname, user, port, identity_files
- SshHostBlock: Internal parsing state for accumulating host directives

New functions:
- locate_ssh_config(): Find default ~/.ssh/config path
- load_ssh_hosts(): Load and parse SSH config from disk
- parse_ssh_config(): Parse config contents into Vec<SshHost>
- redact_identity_path(): Safely redact identity file paths for display

Parsing features:
- Handles multiple aliases per Host stanza
- Filters wildcard patterns (* and ?)
- Merges directives for repeated Host aliases
- Strips inline comments (respecting quoted strings)
- Supports both whitespace and = key-value separators
- Handles quoted values properly

Test updates:
- Add basic_config and comments_config fixtures
- Test basic parsing with all directive types
- Test comment stripping and edge cases

patterns.rs:
- Fix test text to include trailing period to prevent regex
  matching across concatenated boundaries
- Update test rule ID to use proper namespace prefix

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# Example SSH config
+Host prod
+  HostName prod.example.com
+  User ubuntu
+  Port 2222
+  IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
+  IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_work
+
+Host staging dev
+  HostName staging.example.com
+  User deploy
+
+Host *
+  User root
+
+Host ?wildcard
+  HostName should-ignore.example.com

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Comment-only line
+Host   test   # inline comment
+  HostName test.example.com   # trailing comment
+  User   alice
+  Port  2200
+  IdentityFile "~/.ssh/id_rsa"  # quoted path
+
+# Global options should be ignored
+User ignored
